rows.finalText: The cards answer "What is the next right step in my calling" through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Heart (24), so the need to choose what aligns with your core values is already in play. Heart often points to what still feels genuinely meaningful, and the part of the path that remains emotionally true in your calling. Fox (14) in Present acts as the fulcrum, putting skillful caution and tactical thinking are required where the sequence can turn.
